changes.value:
**board-progress.tsx:24-27**

The docstring says "Shows done tasks (last column) / total tasks" and the code still computes done from `board.columns[board.columns.length - 1]`. This is the known-wrong logic that card 3 will fix. The `getNum` import will also become unused after that fix.

No action needed now — card 01KKSW6MAPB8MAFY8M42224GNB addresses this.

- [ ] Verify this is resolved after card 3 is implemented
nit: board-progress.tsx still guesses done from last column (will be fixed by card 3)
